Class JDBCOrdersManager

java.lang.Object
jdbc.JDBCOrdersManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
OrdersManager
public class JDBCOrdersManager extends Object implements OrdersManager

    Description

    Constructs a new JDBCOrdersManager with the given database connection.

  • Constructor Details

    • JDBCOrdersManager

      public JDBCOrdersManager(Connection connection)
      Constructs a new JDBCOrdersManager with the given database connection.
      Parameters:
      connection - the database connection

  • Method Details

    • createOrder

      public boolean createOrder(Order o)
      Creates a new order in the system.
      Specified by:
      createOrder in interface OrdersManager
      Parameters:
      o - the order object to create
      Returns:
      true if the order was successfully created, false otherwise

    • updateOrderStatus

      public boolean updateOrderStatus(String id, String status)
      Updates the status of an existing order.
      Specified by:
      updateOrderStatus in interface OrdersManager
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the order to update
      status - the new status to set
      Returns:
      true if the status was successfully updated, false otherwise

    • deleteOrder

      public boolean deleteOrder(String id)
      Deletes an order from the system.
      Specified by:
      deleteOrder in interface OrdersManager
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the order to delete
      Returns:
      true if the order was successfully deleted, false otherwise

    • findOrderById

      public Order findOrderById(String id)
      Finds an order by its ID.
      Specified by:
      findOrderById in interface OrdersManager
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the order
      Returns:
      the order object if found, null otherwise

    • getAllOrders

      public List<Order> getAllOrders()
      Retrieves all orders in the system.
      Specified by:
      getAllOrders in interface OrdersManager
      Returns:
      a list of all orders
